data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. AUTUMN DREAM scored well at Warwick Farm in her penultimate start before a flat effort in a higher grade than this on the Kenso track at Randwick. He draws well, and with the advantage of the pole position at this level, he can bounce straight back into the money. 4. SHANGRI LA IMPACT resumed with a strong on-pace win over a mile at Kembla Grange in her first run for Tom Charlton. She has a fair bit of scope and is bred to improve with more racing. Stick with her. 12. VIA FLAMINIA was disappointing at Wyong, but she was probably already looking for this longer trip. Her record here is excellent with 2 wins from 3 attempts, and she can make amends, despite her wide draw.","runners":[2,4,12],"exclusive":true}
